subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.SL.TZ0.7
question_html:
Which of the following shows a general increase across period 3 from Na to Cl?

A.  Ionic radius

B.  Atomic radius

C.  Ionization energy

D.  Melting point
examiners_html: Although 75% of candidates had the correct answer, this question about trends across period 3 was not a very good discriminator.
